Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Okay, shopping for club stuff is done![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Good thing you came with me, {f 4 1}-kun. I didn't realize there was so much to buy...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Also, I wasn't really in the mental state to do this alone today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 13 12 15 106}Oh, nothing major. Maybe I was exaggerating a bit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}{f 4 21 106 10}...You're not going to ask me what happened? That's what you're supposed to do, you know. Based on the conversation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}On today's classic literature pop quiz, I didn't know any of the answers...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}And before I knew it, I'd dozed off. I ended up handing in a blank paper.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Tell me about it. And then Mr. Ekoda got all pissed off![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}He called me to the faculty office, and even yelled at me about the length of my skirt![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}I know, right? I didn't do it on purpose. But then Mr. Ekoda got all pissed off...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}He called me to the faculty office and told me I had to write a reflection essay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I had to listen to Mr. Ekoda lecture me for the longest time.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}He was all like, "At this rate, you'll end up as a good-for-nothing adult," and "You're not putting enough thought into your future."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}But come on, it's way too early to worry about the future, isn't it? We're still just teenagers![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 13 12 15 106}Right!? We should be allowed to enjoy ourselves now, while we still can.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Honestly, I haven't really thought about my future at all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Seriously? I didn't know you cared so much about school, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I... still haven't really thought much about my future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Hmm, not particularly... Well, I guess I would like to graduate.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Anything after that is pretty much undecided.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I'm working hard for the track team, so I think that's good enough for now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}As for the future, well... I've got plenty of time to think about it later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko is smiling happily.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}...Hm, I guess this isn't the best place for a long conversation, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I'm gonna go drop these off at the storage room. See ya.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Hey! It's dangerous to be running around here—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}How many times do I have to tell you!? You can call me big sis, nothing else![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}...Oh no, they're gonna catch me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}That kid lives across the street from me. Why on earth are they playing tag in a place like this?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}I mean, it's dangerous, right? They should go play in the schoolyard or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Oh no, the school gate is gonna close soon! I'll see you at practice, {f 4 1}-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After saying goodbye to Yuko,[n]I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: Label is not used[n]{f 1 1}
